name: PLS Check Cashers
description_short: At 2149 N Town E Blvd, Mesquite, TX 75150, you can find PLS Check Cashers, reachable at +1 972-279-8118.
description_long:
PLS Financial Services, Inc. is a multi-state financial services retailer operating under the PLS 247 brand, with physical store locations across Arizona, California, Illinois, Indiana, Kentucky, Massachusetts, New York, North Carolina, Ohio, Oklahoma, Texas, and Wisconsin. The company positions itself as a full-service community financial center, combining traditional check cashing with a broad suite of ancillary services under one roof. The store at 4400 W. Armitage Ave. in Chicago operates as a Community Currency Exchange location, a common licensing model in Illinois for non-bank financial services providers.

PLS offers an unusually wide range of services grouped into five categories. Under financial services, customers can cash checks, purchase money orders, pay bills, send money internationally via Ria Money Transfer, access government benefits, and exchange foreign currency. The transportation services category is distinctive — PLS handles vehicle registration renewals, title transfers, license plate purchases, city stickers, and transit cards, services normally requiring a trip to the Secretary of State office. The company also issues the Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard, a prepaid debit card with a companion mobile app, including a Toys for Tots co-branded version. Business customers can access a dedicated PLS For Business service tier. Ancillary services include fax and copy, notary services (accepting wills, deeds, trusts, power of attorney, and living wills), ATMs, phone top-ups, and cash and coin handling.

The most distinguishing feature of PLS is that all advertised services are available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week — an unusual operational commitment across all five service categories including vehicle registration and notary services. The combination of Illinois Secretary of State-delegated transportation functions with financial services is a genuine convenience differentiator, allowing customers to handle both DMV-type paperwork and financial transactions in a single stop at any hour.

PLS serves primarily unbanked and underbanked consumers who need immediate access to cash without a traditional bank account. The website does not publicly disclose check cashing fees or money order pricing, which is a meaningful transparency gap — fees at check cashers typically range from 1% to 5% of the check face value, and consumers should ask about the exact fee structure before using the service. While the 24/7 availability and breadth of services are genuine advantages, the absence of savings products, credit building tools, or any path toward mainstream banking means PLS is a transaction utility rather than a financial wellness resource.
address: 2149 N Town E Blvd, Mesquite, TX 75150

company_info.headquarters: 2149 N Town E Blvd, Mesquite, TX 75150

pros: All services available 24/7 including weekends and holidays
Illinois vehicle registration, title transfers, and license plates handled in-store — no DMV trip required
Ria Money Transfer available for international remittances
Xpectations! PLUS Prepaid Debit Mastercard with companion mobile app for unbanked consumers
Notary services available for legal documents including wills, deeds, and power of attorney
Operates across 12 states with consistent service offerings
cons: Check cashing fees and money order pricing are not disclosed on the website — consumers must ask in-store
No savings accounts, credit building products, or path to mainstream banking
No online or mobile check cashing — services require a physical store visit
Prepaid debit card (Xpectations!) typically carries monthly fees and transaction charges not detailed on the site
Primarily serves unbanked consumers, meaning repeat users pay ongoing transaction fees with no long-term financial benefit
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked individuals who need immediate cash from a paycheck or government check
Illinois residents who want to combine vehicle registration renewal with financial errands in one stop
People who work non-standard hours and need financial services outside of bank business hours
Immigrants or travelers needing international money transfers via Ria or foreign currency exchange
diagnosis: PLS Check Cashers is best suited for unbanked consumers who need immediate cash access, 24/7 service availability, or the convenience of handling Illinois vehicle registration alongside financial transactions in one location. The main caveat is fee opacity — check cashing costs are not published online, and repeat reliance on check cashing instead of a free bank account will cost significantly more over time.
